channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: BYU to play Colorado in Alamo Bowl December 28
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team will be taking on a fellow Big 12 team in a bowl game this season. #17 BYU and #23 Colorado both accepted invitations to play in the Alama Bowl December 28th in San Antonio. The game will be televised on ABC4 at 5:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cataldi promises hospitalized teammate Bove a goal and delivers as Fiorentina wins 8th straight
item.description: ROME (AP) — Danilo Cataldi texted hospitalized Fiorentina teammate Edoardo Bove to say that he would score for him Sunday and then fulfilled his promise in a 1-0 win over Cagliari on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tamar Bates scores 29 points to help Missouri beat No. 1 Kansas 76-67
item.description: COLUMBIA, Mo. (AP) — Tamar Bates had 29 points and five steals to help Missouri beat Hunter Dickinson and No. 1 Kansas 76-67 on Sunday. Mark Mitchell scored 17 points in Missouri’s first win over Kansas since a 74-71 victory on Feb. 4, 2012.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SOLOMON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why did the SF Giants add Willy Adames? A deep dive into the numbers
item.description: Adames has never been an All-Star, Gold Glover or Silver Slugger, but the 29-year-old has long been one of the best shortstops in baseball
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Viral ring girl Sydney Thomas reveals Jake Paul message before popularity skyrocketed
item.description: Sydney Thomas, the ring girl who went viral during last month's boxing spectacle, revealed a message she received from Jake Paul before her fame took off.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Where to find our complete Week 15 coverage
item.description: Weekend highlights included Pittsburg's amazing comeback against Folsom, plus wins by Amador Valley, Moreau Catholic.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Alexandre Pantoja successfully defends flyweight belt with technical submission of Kai Asakura
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Alexandre Pantoja staked his claim as one of the greatest flyweights in UFC history when he defended his title Saturday night with a technical submission of Japan's Kai Asakura, using a rear naked choke to put his challenger to sleep at the 2:05 mark of the second round.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 18 Clemson beats No. 8 SMU 34-31 on last-second field goal for ACC title, berth in the CFP
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Cade Klubnik sat in his car for more than hour last Saturday crying following Clemson's loss to rival South Carolina, figuring his team's chances of reaching the College Football Playoff were over. My how things can change.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trevor Lawrence's teammate fined for attacking Azeez Al-Shaair after illegal hit
item.description: The NFL fined Jacksonville Jaguars tight end Evan Engram $11,255 for unnecessary roughness in response to an illegal hit on quarterback Trevor Lawrence.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LA Galaxy strike early, hold off New York Red Bulls 2-1 to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: CARSON, Calif. (AP) — The LA Galaxy finished 26th in the 29-team Major League Soccer standings just one season ago, and their biggest supporters boycotted certain matches to protest a decade of poor performance.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL closes probe of latest Deshaun Watson sexual assault allegations without discipline
item.description: An NFL spokesperson said the investigation into the most recent sexual assault allegations against Browns QB Deshaun Watson is now considered closed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City drops more points after draw with Crystal Palace and Man United loses again
item.description: Manchester City’s Premier League title defense took another blow after drawing with Crystal Palace 2-2 on Saturday. Four-time defending champion City ended a seven-game winless run on Wednesday by beating Nottingham Forest, but dropped more points with the draw at Selhurst Park.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey gets a triple-double as the Bulls race past the Nets for a 128-102 victory
item.description: Josh Giddey had 20 points, 13 rebounds and 11 assists, helping the Chicago Bulls beat the Brooklyn Nets 128-102 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
